zh.lifeSummary: Isabella de Patingham於1188年出生在英國斯塔福爾。她和Ralph Basset 2nd Baron Basset of Drayton至少有1個兒子。她去世於1237年3月31日在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾德雷頓 巴塞特享年49歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: Isabella de Patingham was born in 1188, in Staffordshire, England. She had at least 1 son with Ralph Basset 2nd Baron Basset of Drayton. She died on 31 March 1237, in Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Isabella de Patingham est née en 1188, à Staffordshire, Angleterre. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Ralph Basset 2nd Baron Basset of Drayton. Elle est décédée le 31 mars 1237, à Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 49 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabella de Patinghamは1188年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアで生まれた。彼女はRalph Basset 2nd Baron Basset of Draytonとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1237年3月31日にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアドレイトン バセットで49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabella de Patingham(은)는 1188년 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Ralph Basset 2nd Baron Basset of Drayton(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1237년 3월 31일 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 드라이턴 배싯에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Isabella de Patingham родилась в 1188 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Ralph Basset 2nd Baron Basset of Drayton. Она умерла 31 марта 1237 г. в местности дреитон бассетт, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 49 лет.
